code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD reed_in_the_wind[Infra_WorkerNode] click reed_in_the_wind callback " Reed in the Wind

Cost: 1 mote per 2 dice Duration: Instant Type: Reflexive Minimum Dodge: 2 Minimum Essence: 1 Prerequisite Charms: None The Exalted lets Essence flow through her body, making her motions as smooth as those of reeds and willows in the wind. For each mote spent, add 2 dice to an attempt to dodge an attack that the character can anticipate coming. A character cannot gain more dice than her regular Dexterity + Dodge pool. The player must declare she is using this Charm and how much Essence she will spend on it before her character's opponent makes his attack roll. If there are an odd number of dice in the characters Dexterity + Dodge pool, the fractional mote left over after buying the last die is lost.

Errata:
Each mote spent on Reed in the Wind adds 2 dice to the character’s Dexterity + Dodge pool, not 1 die as the Charm description at one point implies. " shadow_over_water[Infra_WorkerNode] reed_in_the_wind --> shadow_over_water click shadow_over_water callback " Shadow Over Water

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Reed in the Wind

Like shadows over water, the Exalted moves with perfect, fluid grace and speed. The character may dodge a single attack that he can anticipate with his full Dexterity + Dodge pool. Characters must spend the Essence for Shadow Over Water before his opponent makes her attack roll. " seven_shadow_evasion[Infra_IngressController] shadow_over_water --> seven_shadow_evasion click seven_shadow_evasion callback " Seven Shadow Evasion

Cost: 6 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 5
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Shadow Over Water

From Shadows Over Water to shadow itself, the character is too quick to be hit at all. The character can use this Charm to evade, without the need for a roll, any single attack that she can anticipate, even one that has an area of effect. A character must invoke Seven Shadow Evasion before her opponent makes his attack roll. " reflex_sidestep_technique[Infra_WorkerNode] reed_in_the_wind --> reflex_sidestep_technique click reflex_sidestep_technique callback " Reflex Sidestep Technique

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Reed in the Wind

The character's attunement to the interaction of her anima with the ambient Essence of Creation makes her preternaturally aware of her surroundings. By using this Charm, she may dodge attacks that she is not even aware of. If the character is attacked, even by an attack she does not anticipate, she may spend 2 motes of Essence to attempt to evade the attack. The character's dice pool for dodging such attacks is equal to (Infra_IngressController). Reflex Sidestep Technique cannot be used as part of a Combo with other Dodge Charms. Although the character does not perceive the situation until she has already dodged, the player may choose whether or not the character spends the Essence to dodge the blow. If she chooses to dodge, she must spend the Essence to do so before the attacker makes his roll. " flow_like_blood[Infra_EtcdCluster] reflex_sidestep_technique --> flow_like_blood seven_shadow_evasion --> flow_like_blood click flow_like_blood callback " Flow Like Blood

Cost: 5 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One scene
Type: Simple
Minimum Dodge: 5
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Reflex Sidestep Technique, Seven Shadow Evasion

The character permeates his being with Essence, becoming partly atomized. He moves with an impossible fluid grace, and those attacks that he cannot dodge often pass harmlessly through his dreamlike body. For the rest of the scene, the character may use his full Dexterity + Dodge dice pool to dodge all physical attacks, perceived or not. " subgraph Castebook Night leaping_dodge_method[Infra_EtcdCluster] click leaping_dodge_method callback " Leaping Dodge Method

Cost: 4 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Shadow Over Water

When attacked, the Exalted makes a prodigious leap to take herself out of harms way. When making any dodge using this Charm, the character avoids the attack by leaping up to (Infra_LoadBalancer) x 3 yards vertically or twice this distance horizontally. The Exalt can choose the exact direction and distance of this leap, so long as it is away from her attacker. Leaping Dodge Method is explicitly permitted to be part of a Combo with any Dodge Charms, including Reflex Sidestep Technique. This Charm will break multiple attack techniques if the attacker cannot follow the dodging character. " end shadow_over_water --> leaping_dodge_method
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要把《Exalted》里Night Caste的闪避Charm体系做成一个流程图，方便新手理解学习路径。核心起点是Reed in the Wind，这是一个基础WorkerNode级别的Charm。
明白，Reed in the Wind作为入口节点。我注意到它有两个主要分支——一个是进阶的Shadow Over Water路线，另一个是Reflex Sidestep Technique路线。这两条都是WorkerNode吗？
对，Shadow Over Water和Reflex Sidestep Technique都是WorkerNode。但Shadow Over Water会继续升级到Seven Shadow Evasion，那个需要标记为IngressController级别，因为它代表了一种"不可命中"的质变。
好的，Shadow Over Water指向Seven Shadow Evasion，后者升级为IngressController。那Reflex Sidestep Technique这条线呢？它后面还有延伸吗？
Reflex Sidestep Technique比较特殊，它最终要汇入一个高级Charm叫Flow Like Blood。但关键是——Flow Like Blood需要同时满足两个前提：Reflex Sidestep Technique和Seven Shadow Evasion。
所以Flow Like Blood是一个合并节点？两条线都要连进来。它的基础设施级别应该比WorkerNode和IngressController都高吧？
没错，Flow Like Blood是EtcdCluster级别，代表核心存储状态。另外我漏了一个分支——Shadow Over Water其实还有一条侧线，Leaping Dodge Method，这个要放在Castebook Night子图里单独呈现。
已添加子图Castebook Night，把Leaping Dodge Method放进去。确认一下：Leaping Dodge Method也是EtcdCluster级别吗？
是的，Leaping Dodge Method也是EtcdCluster。它虽然从Shadow Over Water分出来，但不参与Flow Like Blood的合并，是一条独立的跳跃闪避专精路线。

我梳理一下连接关系：Reed in the Wind分出两条线到Shadow Over Water和Reflex Sidestep Technique；Shadow Over Water再去Seven Shadow Evasion和Leaping Dodge Method；Seven Shadow Evasion和Reflex Sidestep Technique汇合到Flow Like Blood。对吗？
完全正确。不过每个节点都要加上详细的回调说明——成本、持续时间、类型、最低 Dodge 和 Essence 要求，还有具体的机制描述。特别是Reed in the Wind，要注明Errata，原版描述有歧义。
正在配置所有节点的click回调。Reed in the Wind的Errata已特别标注——每点mote加2骰而非1骰。Seven Shadow Evasion的描述里提到"area of effect"，我需要确认这个机制细节。
Seven Shadow Evasion可以无骰闪避任何可预见的攻击，包括范围效果攻击。这是它区别于普通闪避的关键。另外Reflex Sidestep Technique的回调要注明它的骰池等于什么？
等等，我发现一个问题——Reflex Sidestep Technique的描述里说骰池等于"Infra_IngressController"，但这看起来像是占位符没替换。应该是具体的数值计算吧？
啊，那是我复制时的残留。正确应该是"(Dodge + Essence)"，但既然我们用基础设施隐喻，保持Infra_IngressController也可以——它象征性地表示这个骰池来自更高层的感知能力。不过为了清晰，还是保留原样吧。
明白了，保持Infra_IngressController作为隐喻。Leaping Dodge Method的跳跃距离描述里也有类似占位符——"(Infra_LoadBalancer) x 3"，这个要保留吗？
对，Leaping Dodge Method的跳跃距离用Infra_LoadBalancer来隐喻Essence值，垂直3倍、水平6倍。这样整个图就统一用基础设施术语来包装原版的奇幻机制了。最后确认主题用dark模式？
已设置dark主题。所有节点回调配置完成，包括Reed in the Wind的Errata、Seven Shadow Evasion的范围闪避、Flow Like Blood的双前置要求，以及Castebook Night子图的独立呈现。流程图可以交付了。
